Simorchip PSSD · SP200 Vault
SP200 · USB 3.2 Gen 2×2
A Vault
You Carry.
帶著走的保險庫

An aluminum-armored portable SSD that locks your work down and moves at 2000MB/s. The whole project — sealed inside something the size of your palm.
把整個專案，封進手掌大小的鋁合金裝甲裡

USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 2000MB/s 512GB – 2TB Aluminum Armor iPhone 15+
2000 MB/s · Gen 2×2
Aluminum Armor Shell
Scroll
The idea
A drive shouldn't feel fragile. Your work isn't. So we built a vault — armored, fast, and small enough to live in your bag.
硬碟不該感覺脆弱，你的工作也不脆弱。所以我們做了一個保險庫——裝甲、極速，小到能住進你的包裡。
VAULT
SP200
Scroll to turn — 捲動,轉正
Built Like Armor.
像裝甲一樣造出來的
Layer 01 — Speed
Done Before
You Look Up.
你一抬頭，它就傳完了

A full day of 4K footage. A project folder that used to mean a coffee break while the progress bar crawled. USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 reads up to 2000MB/s and writes up to 1800MB/s — fast enough that the wait stops being a step in your workflow.

You drag the files in, you glance away, and they're already there. The drive isn't waiting on the bus. The bus is waiting on you.

一整天的 4K 素材、一個過去得去倒杯咖啡等進度條的資料夾。Gen 2×2 讀 2000、寫 1800 MB/s——快到「等待」不再是流程裡的一步。拖進去、視線一移，它就在那了。

USB 3.2 Gen 2×2
Read up to 2000MB/s · Write up to 1800MB/s
0
MB/s · Sequential Read
Read2000 MB/s
Write1800 MB/s
Layer 02 — Capacity
A Folder,
Or A Library.
一個資料夾，或一整座資料庫

512GB for the working set you reach for every day. 1TB when the backup and the project live on the same drive. 2TB when "everything" is the only answer that makes sense — the archive, the footage, the years you can't afford to lose.

512GB 裝每天要用的；1TB 讓備份和專案同住一顆；2TB 給「全部」是唯一答案的時候——封存檔、素材、那些你輸不起的年份。同一個裝甲外殼，三種份量。

512GB · 1TB · 2TB
512
GB
1
TB
2
TB
64 × 64 × 10.5 mm · one shell, three sizes
Layer 03 — Armor
Armor You
Can Pocket.
能放進口袋的裝甲

A 64mm square, 10.5mm thin. The casing is aluminum alloy — and that's not styling. Metal pulls heat away from the drive so a sustained transfer stays fast instead of throttling, and it shrugs off the knocks of a bag, a desk, a daily commute.

The black body and its red armor line aren't decoration either — they're the design language: built to protect, made to carry.

64mm 見方、10.5mm 薄，鋁合金外殼不只是好看——金屬把熱帶走，讓長時間傳輸不降速，也扛得住包包、桌面、每天的碰撞。黑機身配紅裝甲線就是它的設計語言：為保護而生，為攜帶而做。

Aluminum alloy housing · 64 × 64 × 10.5 mm
Heat-dissipating shell · Black / red armor design
HousingAluminum Alloy
Dimensions64 × 64 × 10.5 mm
CoolingMetal Heat Dissipation
DesignBlack / Red Armor
Layer 04 — Universal
Every Device.
Even The iPhone.
每一台裝置，連 iPhone 都行

Windows at the office, a Mac at home, a Linux box in the rack, the Android phone in your pocket — and, since iPhone 15, that too. One Type-C connection, plug-and-play, no app to install and no driver to chase.

公司的 Windows、家裡的 Mac、機櫃裡的 Linux、口袋裡的 Android——還有，從 iPhone 15 開始，連它也行。一個 Type-C、隨插即用，不裝 App、不找驅動。這個保險庫不在乎你從哪扇門走過來，它都開。

Type-C plug-and-play
Windows · macOS · Linux · Android · iPhone 15+
Windows
Desktop & laptop, plug-and-play
macOS
Native Type-C, no adapter
Linux
Mounts and runs out of the box
Android
Phones & tablets with USB-C
iPhone 15+
The Type-C era, finally direct
Layer 05 — Steady
Built To
Stay Steady.
穩得住，跑得涼

An SM2320 controller does the thinking; quality NAND holds the data. The aluminum shell doubles as a heat sink, so a long write doesn't turn into a slow one. It sips power — 5V, 5W — and works from 0°C to 50°C, parked safely from -25°C to 70°C.

SM2320 主控負責思考，優質 NAND 守住資料；鋁合金外殼同時是散熱片，讓長寫入不變慢。它很省電——5V、5W——0°C 到 50°C 工作，-25°C 到 70°C 安全存放。這些你都不會察覺，而這正是重點。

SM2320 controller · Quality NAND flash
5V / 5W · Operating 0°C ~ 50°C · Storage -25°C ~ 70°C
SM2320
Controller tuned for sustained throughput
Quality NAND
Selected flash for long-term retention
Metal Cooling
Aluminum shell doubles as a heat sink
5V · 5W
Low draw, bus-powered, no brick
0°C ~ 50°C
Operating range for the real world

Vault.

VAULT
Model
Simorchip SP200 — portable SSD, codename Vault.
Vault
Built to protect like one — carried like nothing.
2000
Read speed — up to 2000 MB/s, USB 3.2 Gen 2×2.
Lock it in. Take it anywhere.
鎖進去，帶著走
Specifications
The Whole Truth.
Here Are The Numbers.
全部的真相，數字都在這。
ModelSP200 (Vault)
InterfaceUSB 3.2 Gen 2×2 · Type-C Female Port
Dimensions64 × 64 × 10.5 mm
Capacity512GB / 1TB / 2TB
Controller / SolutionSM2320
Flash MemoryQuality NAND Flash
Performance (MB/s)Read up to 2000 / Write up to 1800
Operating Voltage5V
Power Consumption5W
MaterialAluminum Alloy
ColorBlack / Red accent
Operating Temperature0°C ~ 50°C
Storage Temperature-25°C ~ 70°C
Supported SystemsWindows / macOS / Linux / Android / iPhone 15 and above
* All data secured from Simorchip's internal labs under specific testing conditions.
Accurate data may vary depending on the operating environment.
